en_title: The Complicated History of GTA Controversies
cn_title: 从道德恐慌到Hot Coffee，GTA争议史有多复杂
subtitle: 越骂越卖座
opus_summary: 《GTA》从1997年初代起就伴随道德恐慌、诉讼和媒体围攻。从Jack Thompson到Hot Coffee，再到《GTA5》的酷刑任务和名人肖像官司，争议反而塑造了系列的文化地位。

paragraphs.en: You don't become one of the biggest, most profitable media franchises in human history without stepping on a few toes, especially when there’s literally a violent felony in your name.
paragraphs.cn: 如果不踩到几个人的脚，你不可能成为人类历史上最大、最赚钱的媒体系列之一，尤其是当你的名字里真的带着一种暴力重罪时。

paragraphs.en: “Grand Theft Auto” was destined to collide with controversy. Lawsuits, international incidents, and full-on moral panics have followed in the wake of the series’ unparalleled success. And while there’s often a kernel of truth to some concerns raised over the violent, over-the-top nature of GTA, advocacy groups and opportunists have spent decades disingenuously trying to take one of gaming’s greatest series down before it warps the fragile little minds of our children.
paragraphs.cn: 「Grand Theft Auto」注定会撞上争议。随着这个系列无与伦比的成功，诉讼、国际事件和彻头彻尾的道德恐慌也一路相随。虽然人们对GTA暴力和夸张性质提出的一些担忧，往往确实有一点道理，但倡议团体和机会主义者几十年来一直不真诚地试图打倒游戏史上最伟大的系列之一，免得它扭曲我们孩子脆弱的小脑袋。

paragraphs.en: Anything with as much cultural significance as GTA can have an influence on someone, maybe even a bad one, but study after study after study has failed to find any link between playing violent video games and antisocial behavior in the real world. That hasn’t stopped opponents from attacking the series since pretty much day one. These are Grand Theft Auto’s biggest controversies.
paragraphs.cn: 任何像GTA这样具有文化意义的东西都可能影响某个人，甚至可能产生坏影响；但一项又一项研究始终没有发现玩暴力电子游戏与现实世界反社会行为之间存在联系。这并没有阻止反对者几乎从第一天起就攻击这个系列。以下是《GTA》最大的争议。

paragraphs.en: 1. Top Down Trouble
paragraphs.cn: 1. 俯视角风波

paragraphs.en: Back in 1997, we were just emerging from the first real video game moral panic (it was mostly about Mortal Kombat). Violence and vulgarity was the cultural vibe, with transgressive content pitched against the moral majority in a war for our attention and our souls. In Scotland, DMA Design - the studio that just made Lemmings - was about to release its next title: a top-down driving game called Grand Theft Auto.
paragraphs.cn: 回到1997年，我们才刚刚走出第一场真正的电子游戏道德恐慌（主要围绕《真人快打》）。暴力和粗俗是当时的文化氛围，越界内容与道德多数派争夺我们的注意力和灵魂。在苏格兰，刚刚做出《百战天虫》的DMA Design正准备推出下一款作品：一款名为《Grand Theft Auto》的俯视角驾驶游戏。

paragraphs.en: The word was already out months before release: this is a game where you do crime . UK tabloids like the Daily Mail ran lurid headlines describing all of the anarchy allowed by the “criminal computer game that glorifies hit-and-run thugs,” while members of Parliament, such as Lord Campbell of Croy, warned that there’d be no way to stop kids from getting their impressionable little hands on it .
paragraphs.cn: 游戏发售前几个月，风声就已经传开：这是一款让你犯罪的游戏。英国小报如《每日邮报》刊出耸动标题，描述这款「歌颂肇事逃逸恶棍的犯罪电脑游戏」允许的各种无政府行为；而国会议员如Lord Campbell of Croy警告称，根本无法阻止孩子们用易受影响的小手拿到它。

paragraphs.en: The Right Honorable Lord might have been sincere in his convictions, but as it turned out, he was playing right into DMA’s hands. The studio’s publisher, multimedia giant BMG, was used to creating buzz for their transgressive music acts like the Sex Pistols, and was more than happy to lean into the sleazy side of GTA. It hired a publicist who leaked details to newspapers and used a whisper network to make sure that certain pearl-clutching politicians were aware of the upcoming crime simulator. Then, they launched a radio campaign featuring clips from the House of Lords debate that made the game sound completely awesome.
paragraphs.cn: 这位尊贵的上议院议员也许真心相信自己的判断，但事实证明，他正好落入了DMA的安排。该工作室的发行商、多媒体巨头BMG，习惯于为Sex Pistols这类越界音乐艺人制造话题，也非常乐意顺着GTA粗俗的一面炒作。它聘请了一名公关，把细节泄露给报纸，并利用小道消息网络确保某些道德惊恐的政客知道这款即将到来的犯罪模拟器。随后，他们推出了一轮广播宣传，里面使用了上议院辩论的片段，听起来让这款游戏酷到不行。

paragraphs.en: Grand Theft Auto was a big success, despite its 18+ rating and the fact that it was banned in Brazil. It sold over three million copies by 1999. Grand Theft Auto’s first brush with infamy might have been manufactured, but it taught DMA and, later, Rockstar a valuable lesson: a little controversy can create a lot of cash.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管有18+评级，而且在巴西被禁，《Grand Theft Auto》仍然取得巨大成功。到1999年，它已经卖出超过300万份。《Grand Theft Auto》第一次沾上恶名也许是被制造出来的，但它教会了DMA以及后来的Rockstar一个宝贵教训：一点争议可以换来很多现金。

paragraphs.en: 2. Grand Theft Thompson
paragraphs.cn: 2. Thompson与《侠盗猎车手》

paragraphs.en: In the wake of the 1999 Columbine ​​High School mass shooting, critics pointed fingers at Doom rather than grappling with the real causes. The moral panic was in full swing when Grand Theft Auto 3 and its revolutionary, more “realistic” 3D depiction of crime hit the scene, and one man pounced on the opportunity to make himself part of its story.
paragraphs.cn: 1999年科伦拜恩高中枪击案后，批评者没有面对真正原因，而是把矛头指向《毁灭战士》。当《GTA3》以及它革命性、更「真实」的3D犯罪描绘登场时，道德恐慌正全面爆发，而一个人抓住机会，把自己写进了这个故事。

paragraphs.en: Jack Thompson is a conservative attorney and activist who spent over a decade waging an obnoxious war on the industry. He was a frequent talking head on cable news, constantly blaming video games for real world violent crimes. He’s gone after a lot of different titles over the years, but he had a particular axe to grind with Rockstar.
paragraphs.cn: Jack Thompson是一名保守派律师和活动人士，他花了十多年时间对游戏行业发动一场令人厌烦的战争。他经常在有线新闻节目中作为评论嘉宾出现，不断把现实世界的暴力犯罪归咎于电子游戏。这些年他攻击过许多不同作品，但他尤其对Rockstar怀恨在心。

paragraphs.en: Thompson hounded the franchise for years with lawsuits and TV hits accusing GTA of inspiring horrific tragedies. He frequently sued Rockstar’s owner, Take-Two Interactive, as well as retail stores selling GTA and Sony for making the consoles it could be played on. His clients were typically family members of the victims of violent crimes, and he usually demanded outrageous amounts of money. His most high-profile case involved Devin Moore, a man in Alabama who was convicted of killing three police officers in 2005. Thompson filed a suit alleging that it was his obsession with GTA that caused him to snap.
paragraphs.cn: Thompson多年来通过诉讼和电视露面纠缠这个系列，指控GTA激发了可怕悲剧。他经常起诉Rockstar的所有者Take-Two Interactive，也起诉销售GTA的零售店，以及制造可运行GTA主机的索尼。他的客户通常是暴力犯罪受害者家属，而他通常索要荒唐数额的赔偿。他最知名的案件涉及Devin Moore，这名阿拉巴马男子于2005年被判杀害三名警察。Thompson提起诉讼，声称正是Moore对GTA的痴迷导致他失控。

paragraphs.en: The Moore case gave Thompson a national platform for his one-man vendetta against Rockstar, and cable news was happy to give him a soapbox. It was a big enough deal that the BBC made a movie about it in 2015. Rockstar called it “random, made up bollocks.” IGN gave it a 4.5/10 . But the case was extremely flimsy and quickly dismissed. Thompson wound up in trouble with the Alabama bar as a result of his behavior, something that would become a theme throughout his career.
paragraphs.cn: Moore案给了Thompson一个全国平台，让他推进自己针对Rockstar的一人复仇行动，而有线新闻也乐于给他麦克风。这件事影响大到BBC在2015年拍了一部电影。Rockstar称那是「随机编造的屁话」。IGN给了它4.5/10分。但这个案子极其薄弱，很快被驳回。Thompson也因为自己的行为惹上阿拉巴马律师协会的麻烦，而这会成为他整个职业生涯中的反复主题。

paragraphs.en: Thompson was undeterred by his losses, but concerns about GTA’s violence were soon drowned out by an even more lurid scandal. GTA is, after all, about America. As a nation, we have an unfortunate tendency to give brutality a pass, but we lose our minds when bro asks his date inside for some hot coffee.
paragraphs.cn: Thompson并没有因为失败而退缩，但围绕GTA暴力的担忧很快被一场更耸动的丑闻淹没。毕竟，GTA讲的是美国。作为一个国家，我们很不幸地倾向于放过残暴，却会在某人邀请约会对象进屋喝点热咖啡时集体发疯。

paragraphs.en: 3. Hot Coffee
paragraphs.cn: 3. 热咖啡

paragraphs.en: Following the revolutionary design of GTA 3 and Vice City, anticipation for San Andreas was through the roof. At Rockstar, designer Sam Houser didn’t want to disappoint fans who expected the franchise to push even more boundaries.
paragraphs.cn: 继《GTA3》和《罪恶都市》的革命性设计之后，玩家对《圣安地列斯》的期待高到爆表。在Rockstar，设计师Sam Houser不想让期待这个系列进一步突破边界的粉丝失望。

paragraphs.en: “We are keen to include new functionality and interaction in line with the 'vibe' of the game,” he wrote at the time . “To this end, in addition to the violence and bad language, we want to include sexual content, which I understand is questionable to certain people, but pretty natural (more than violence), when you think about it and consider the fact that the game is intended for adults.”
paragraphs.cn: 他当时写道：「我们很想加入符合游戏『氛围』的新功能和互动。为此，除了暴力和脏话之外，我们还想加入性内容。我理解这对某些人来说有问题，但如果你想想，并考虑到这款游戏面向成年人，它其实相当自然（比暴力更自然）。」

paragraphs.en: During development, Rockstar worked on a full-fledged minigame to serve as the final stage of the game’s dating activity, in which the player controls main character CJ in flagrante delicto . Unfortunately for Houser, sex would tip the scale and result in San Andreas being slapped with an “Adults Only” rating. Up to 80% of U.S. retailers flat-out refused to stock anything rated AO. If they wanted San Andreas to sell, CJ must remain chaste.
paragraphs.cn: 开发期间，Rockstar制作了一个完整小游戏，作为游戏约会活动的最终阶段，玩家会控制主角CJ处在亲密行为之中。对Houser来说不幸的是，性内容会让天平倾斜，使《圣安地列斯》被打上「Adults Only」评级。美国多达80%的零售商会直接拒绝上架任何AO评级作品。如果他们想让《圣安地列斯》卖出去，CJ就必须保持贞洁。

paragraphs.en: It was allegedly too late to fully remove the sexual content from the game, since it was already deeply intertwined with the code. Instead, the minigame was merely disabled. As one Dutch modder soon discovered, it would be a simple matter to switch it back on.
paragraphs.cn: 据称，当时已经太晚，无法从游戏中完全移除这些性内容，因为它已经和代码深度交织在一起。于是，这个小游戏只是被禁用了。正如一名荷兰Mod作者很快发现的那样，把它重新打开会非常简单。

paragraphs.en: Patrick Wildenborg and his modding buddies started digging into San Andreas as soon as the game came out in October of 2004, cracking open the codebase and discovering strangely named files like “KISSING” and “SNM.” They realized these were animations of explicit (albeit fully-clothed) sex acts from a dummied-out dating minigame, but Wildenbord decided to sit on the discovery until the PC version released the next summer. With one simple change in a hex editor, the forbidden content was restored. Wildenbord published his discovery on June 7, 2005, naming the mod “Hot Coffee.”
paragraphs.cn: Patrick Wildenborg和他的Mod伙伴们在游戏于2004年10月发售后立刻开始挖掘《圣安地列斯》，打开代码库后发现了「KISSING」和「SNM」等命名奇怪的文件。他们意识到，这些是一个被废弃约会小游戏中露骨（尽管角色完全穿着衣服）性行为的动画，但Wildenborg决定把这个发现压到次年夏天PC版发售后再说。只要在十六进制编辑器里做一个简单改动，禁忌内容就会恢复。Wildenborg于2005年6月7日公布自己的发现，并把这个Mod命名为「Hot Coffee」。

paragraphs.en: The ESRB certainly didn’t think it was hot. It announced an investigation into the games rating process, prompting the mainstream media to start paying attention. Major retailers like Wal-Mart, Target, and Best Buy immediately stopped selling San Andreas, and Rockstar issued a recall and replaced the tainted copies with a patched version sans the offending, invisible code.
paragraphs.cn: ESRB当然不觉得它很火辣。它宣布调查游戏评级流程，主流媒体也开始关注。沃尔玛、Target和Best Buy等大型零售商立即停止销售《圣安地列斯》，Rockstar则发布召回，用移除了相关隐形代码的补丁版替换受污染版本。

paragraphs.en: In the 2000s, a controversy involving modding and cut content was pretty novel. Non-video game people had a hard time wrapping their heads around the concept that bad stuff was completely inaccessible to the layperson, and both sides took advantage. Rockstar slyly insinuated that the modders created the Hot Coffee themselves, even though Wildenborg had their back and took down the files in solidarity. Meanwhile, the media and politicians acted like sex was a major selling point. Jack Thompson seized the opportunity and reached across the aisle to find an unlikely ally in his quest to annoy gaming out of existence. He prepped Hillary Clinton for a press conference, which resulted in a resolution from Congress calling for an FTC investigation into Hot Coffee.
paragraphs.cn: 在2000年代，围绕Mod和被删内容的争议还相当新鲜。非游戏圈人士很难理解：这些糟糕内容对普通玩家来说其实完全无法访问。双方也都利用了这一点。Rockstar狡猾地暗示Hot Coffee是Mod作者自己创造的，尽管Wildenborg支持他们，并出于团结下架了相关文件。与此同时，媒体和政客表现得像性内容是主要卖点一样。Jack Thompson抓住机会，跨越党派，找到了一个不太可能的盟友，一起试图把游戏烦到消失。他为Hillary Clinton准备了一场新闻发布会，结果促成国会提出决议，要求FTC调查Hot Coffee。

paragraphs.en: The FTC said that Take-Two was deceptive in marketing San Andreas, but let it off with a warning. It was less lucky with the class-action lawsuit that eventually settled for 20 million dollars, but the furor quickly faded. Rockstar had pulled away from the Pay & Spray of public opinion, ready to enter the HD era with their wanted level erased.
paragraphs.cn: FTC认定Take-Two在营销《圣安地列斯》时具有欺骗性，但只给了警告。它在集体诉讼中就没那么幸运，最终以2000万美元(约合人民币1亿元)和解，但风波很快消退。Rockstar像从公众舆论的喷漆店开出来一样，清除了通缉星级，准备进入高清时代。

paragraphs.en: 4. HD Hijinks
paragraphs.cn: 4. 高清时代的闹剧

paragraphs.en: Grand Theft Auto 4 was a big change of pace from the prior “3D Universe” trilogy, notably less violent than its predecessors. Gone are the dismemberments and arcadey gore of the 3D Trilogy, replaced with Euphoria crumple physics– arguably just as unsettling as Tommy Vercetti slicing heads off with a katana, but definitely not as splashy. Despite kind of getting what they wanted, critics refused to let up.
paragraphs.cn: 《GTA4》相较此前「3D宇宙」三部曲是一次巨大节奏变化，暴力程度明显低于前作。3D三部曲中的肢解和街机式血腥不见了，取而代之的是Euphoria布娃娃物理。它可以说和Tommy Vercetti用武士刀砍头一样令人不安，但绝对没那么显眼。尽管批评者算是得到了他们想要的东西，他们仍然拒绝停手。

paragraphs.en: While the violence angle was looking a little dusty, folks found plenty of other reasons to get big MADD about GTA 4. The organization Mothers Against Drunk Driving was upset that the game allowed Nico to get behind the wheel after bro-ing out with Packie or Little Jacob, and petitioned the ESRB to slap the game with an AO rating.
paragraphs.cn: 当暴力角度看起来有点过时时，人们找到了许多其他理由对《GTA4》大发MADD。Mothers Against Drunk Driving这个组织不满游戏允许Nico在和Packie或Little Jacob喝完酒后开车，并请愿要求ESRB给游戏打上AO评级。

paragraphs.en: Rockstar stuck to its guns, insisting that its audience was “more than sophisticated enough to understand the game's content.” They were also sophisticated enough to appreciate the franchise debut of full-frontal male nudity in the “Lost and the Damned” expansion pack. Parents groups sounded the alarm in response , warning that the game “should be kept away -- far away -- from children.”
paragraphs.cn: Rockstar坚持立场，强调自己的受众「足够成熟，能够理解游戏内容」。他们也足够成熟，能欣赏《失落与诅咒》资料片中系列首次出现的正面男性全裸。家长团体对此拉响警报，警告这款游戏「应该远离，远远远离孩子」。

paragraphs.en: No one, least of all Rockstar, would disagree with that statement. Most of these controversies wouldn’t even exist if everyone would just acknowledge that GTA is not a game for kids, even if a ton of kids play it. Every lawsuit, every uproar, every federal investigation has ended up in the same place: the onus is on concerned guardians and retailers to keep these M-rated titles out of kids’ hands, and Rockstar is free to make the games they want to make, no matter how hard people like Jack Thompson try to shut them down.
paragraphs.cn: 没人会不同意这句话，Rockstar尤其不会。如果所有人都承认GTA不是给孩子玩的游戏，哪怕确实有很多孩子在玩它，那么大多数争议根本不会存在。每一场诉讼、每一次风波、每一项联邦调查最终都走向同一个结论：责任在于关心孩子的监护人和零售商，要让这些M级游戏远离孩子之手；Rockstar则可以自由制作自己想做的游戏，不管Jack Thompson这类人多么努力想让它停下来。

paragraphs.en: Thompson was at the height of his relevance in the runup to GTA 4, picking fights with Penny Arcade and scrapping with Adam Sessler on G4. He had become such a pain-in-the-ass to Rockstar by this point that Take-Two preemptively sued him in order to cut off any frivolous lawsuits about GTA 4. The parties settled , with Thompson agreeing not to sue to block the sale or distribution of any of Take-Two’s future games. In exchange, Rockstar dropped the contempt of court charges stemming from Thompson’s improper conduct during his bully campaign against Bully. The war, at long last, was over.
paragraphs.cn: 在《GTA4》发售前夕，Thompson正处在相关性最高的时候。他和Penny Arcade吵架，也在G4上和Adam Sessler交锋。到了这个阶段，他已经让Rockstar烦到Take-Two先发制人地起诉他，以切断任何围绕《GTA4》的无聊诉讼。双方达成和解，Thompson同意不再起诉阻止Take-Two未来任何游戏的销售或发行。作为交换，Rockstar撤回了与Thompson在针对《Bully》的霸凌式行动中不当行为有关的藐视法庭指控。这场战争终于结束了。

paragraphs.en: For five months. Then Thompson accused Take-Two of stealing his likeness and trying to get the game banned. It didn’t work. GTA 4 was a smash hit, and its successor was about to become the biggest thing ever.
paragraphs.cn: 结束了五个月。然后Thompson指控Take-Two偷用了他的肖像，并试图让游戏被禁。没有成功。《GTA4》大获成功，而它的继任者即将成为史上最大事件。

paragraphs.en: 5. Pleading the Fifth
paragraphs.cn: 5. 援引第五修正案

paragraphs.en: GTA 5’s most notable creation was Trevor Phillips, a raving psychopath who canonized the chaos and carnage that players experienced in older titles. For once, an in-game character represented the emergent freedom enjoyed by gamers embarking on unscripted rampages between missions– a balding, tattooed embodiment of Jack Thompson and Hillary Clinton’s darkest fears.
paragraphs.cn: 《GTA5》最引人注目的创造是Trevor Phillips，一个狂躁的精神病角色，把玩家在旧作中体验到的混乱与杀戮正式写进了设定。游戏内角色第一次代表了玩家在任务间展开无脚本暴走时享受的涌现自由：一个秃头、满身纹身、具象化Jack Thompson和Hillary Clinton最深恐惧的人。

paragraphs.en: In a way, his presence almost defused larger concerns about violence, at least in the “think of the children” sense. Trevor was clearly a cartoon character, a straw man who couldn’t survive very long in the real world. If there were really a bunch of Trevors out there copying GTA, we would notice.
paragraphs.cn: 从某种意义上说，他的存在几乎化解了更大的暴力担忧，至少在「想想孩子」这个层面是如此。Trevor显然是一个卡通化角色，一个在现实世界中活不了多久的稻草人。如果外面真有一堆Trevor在模仿GTA，我们会注意到的。

paragraphs.en: Instead, it was one very specific scene that threw GTA 5 in hot water. During the mission “By the Book,” the player controls Trevor as he interrogates an innocent man on behalf of the federal government, using a wrench, a car battery, and pliers to torture information out of him.
paragraphs.cn: 相反，把《GTA5》推入舆论热水的是一个非常具体的场景。在「By the Book」任务中，玩家控制Trevor代表联邦政府审问一名无辜男子，用扳手、汽车电瓶和钳子从他身上拷问情报。

paragraphs.en: Obviously a satire of the U.S. military’s “enhanced interrogation techniques” during the War on Terror, turning torture into a quick-time-event was a bridge too far for many in the media. The mission was widely criticized by the press and condemned by politicians, teacher’s unions, and even Amnesty International , despite the litany of violent crimes against humanity GTA 5 allows one to commit every minute.
paragraphs.cn: 这显然是在讽刺美国军方在反恐战争期间的「强化审讯技术」，但把酷刑做成快速反应事件，对许多媒体来说还是过了线。尽管《GTA5》每分钟都允许玩家犯下一长串反人类暴力罪行，这个任务仍遭到媒体广泛批评，并受到政客、教师工会，甚至国际特赦组织谴责。

paragraphs.en: We’ve talked a lot about when Grand Theft Auto offends the religious right, TV pundits, entire countries, and the ambitions of activists and politicians. But what about when the series gets under the skin of a celebrity?
paragraphs.cn: 我们已经谈了很多《GTA》如何冒犯宗教右翼、电视评论员、整个国家，以及活动人士和政客的野心。但当这个系列惹恼一位名人时，又会怎样？

paragraphs.en: In 2014, actor Lindsay Lohan brought a lawsuit against Take-Two, alleging they had stolen her likeness for GTA 5. The whopping, 67-page complaint was really based on two allegations: First, that the blonde, bikini-clad woman who featured heavily in the marketing was based on a picture of Lohan throwing up her, quote, “signature peace sign.”
paragraphs.cn: 2014年，演员Lindsay Lohan起诉Take-Two，指控对方在《GTA5》中盗用了她的肖像。这份夸张的67页诉状实际上基于两项指控。第一，游戏营销中大量出现的金发比基尼女性，是基于Lohan比出她所谓「标志性和平手势」的一张照片。

paragraphs.en: This claim kind of falls through when one realizes that the woman in the picture looks absolutely nothing like Linsday Lohan. If anything, she looks like early 2010’s “it-girl” Kate Upton, though it turns out that the actual model for the image was a woman named Shelby Welinder, who literally produced receipts by posting her invoice from Rockstar on Instagram.
paragraphs.cn: 当人们意识到图片中的女性看起来和Lindsay Lohan完全不像时，这个说法就有点站不住脚了。如果非要说，她更像2010年代初的「it-girl」Kate Upton，尽管事实证明，这张图的真实模特是一位名叫Shelby Welinder的女性，她甚至在Instagram上发布Rockstar发票，直接拿出了收据。

paragraphs.en: The second claim of Lohan’s suit involved a character named Lacey Jonas, a rather broad parody of Hollywood divas. And… yeah, you don’t have to squint too hard to see that Lohan was probably an influence. Fortunately, art is allowed to poke fun at celebrities, whether they like it or not.
paragraphs.cn: Lohan诉讼的第二项指控涉及一个名叫Lacey Jonas的角色，这是对好莱坞女星相当宽泛的戏仿。而……是的，你不需要眯着眼看太久，就能看出Lohan可能确实有影响。幸运的是，艺术可以嘲弄名人，不管他们喜不喜欢。

paragraphs.en: Rockstar fired back, arguing that the lawsuit was frivolous, Lohan was simply filling it for publicity purposes , and that parody and satire of public figures is protected by the First Amendment. At least on that last part, the court agreed. According to the decision, “this video game's unique story, characters, dialogue, and environment, combined with the player's ability to choose how to proceed in the game, render it a work of fiction and satire.” Lohan was out of luck.
paragraphs.cn: Rockstar反击称，这起诉讼毫无根据，Lohan只是为了宣传目的提起诉讼，而对公众人物的戏仿和讽刺受第一修正案保护。至少在最后一点上，法院同意了。根据裁决，「这款电子游戏独特的故事、角色、对话和环境，结合玩家选择如何推进游戏的能力，使其成为一部虚构和讽刺作品。」Lohan没戏了。

paragraphs.en: For GTA 5, the controversy came and went with a whimper. By this point, violence was part of the fabric of gaming, and the game took far more heat for selling Shark Cards, the in-game currency for its ever-popular online mode, than any of the mature content it contains. No one really cares about violent video games anymore. That battle is over, and people like Jack Thompson lost.
paragraphs.cn: 对《GTA5》来说，争议悄无声息地来又悄无声息地走。到这个时候，暴力已经成为游戏结构的一部分，而这款游戏因为出售鲨鱼卡，也就是其极受欢迎线上模式中的游戏货币，受到的批评远多于任何成人内容。没人真的再关心暴力电子游戏了。那场仗已经结束，Jack Thompson这样的人输了。

paragraphs.en: Grand Theft Auto rose to dominance by pushing boundaries, breaking taboos, and playing with fire but rarely getting burned. If anything, the history of outrage surrounding GTA only added to its irresistible mystique, solidifying its stature as a cannot-miss cultural event. There’s little doubt that Grand Theft Auto 6 and beyond will continue to court controversy while raking in billions and reshaping the entire medium of video games to their image.
paragraphs.cn: 《Grand Theft Auto》通过突破边界、打破禁忌、玩火却很少被烧伤而登上统治地位。如果说有什么影响，那么围绕GTA的愤怒史只会增加它难以抗拒的神秘感，巩固它作为不可错过文化事件的地位。毫无疑问，《GTA6》及之后的作品将继续招惹争议，同时赚进数十亿美元，并按自己的形象重塑整个电子游戏媒介。
